hero.subtitle: Soap Atelier - Denizli
hero.description: Handcrafted artisan soaps made with natural oils and botanicals. Each bar is a small act of self-care.

storySection.title: Nature, memory, and the rituals we turn into soap.
storySection.lead: We design from scenes that stay with us, drawn equally from nature and human life.
storySection.body: A dried leaf carried by a narrow stream, a sandstorm across the desert, a bay that feels like paradise, an emerald seam, life beneath the sea, a carefully brewed coffee, the grain of a wooden table, confetti suspended in the air. What we love to watch, touch, and taste becomes part of our handmade soaps, always in harmony with nature and human life.
storySection.closing: Your skin deserves the best. So does your soul.
storySection.momentsValue: Leaf, desert, bay, emerald, coffee, wood, confetti.
storySection.detailText: Layered with calm motion, mineral warmth, and tactile detail.

about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: Every Ventolivo soap is crafted in small batches using cold-process methods and the finest natural ingredients. No shortcuts, no chemicals - just pure, honest skincare.

coldProcess.title: Cold Process
coldProcess.text: Traditional cold-process method preserving all natural glycerin and nutrients.

smallBatches.title: Small Batches
smallBatches.text: Each batch is made in small quantities to ensure maximum quality and freshness.

natural.title: 100% Natural
natural.text: Only plant-based oils, butters, and botanicals. Nothing artificial, ever.

title.line2: We'd love to hear from you.

cta.description: Send us a message and we'll get back to you within hours

login.title: Secure customer sign in
login.description: Sign in before checkout so we can track purchase intent and keep your product requests in one place.
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
login.accountDisabled: This account is disabled. Please contact support.
login.googleUnavailable: Google sign in is not configured yet.
login.googleFailed: Google sign in failed. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Create an account once to speed up future purchases and make buyer tracking transparent.
register.marketingConsent: I agree to receive product and campaign updates by email.
register.invalidForm: Please review your details and try again.
register.emailTaken: This email already has an account.
register.rateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please wait and try again.
register.passwordHint: Use a strong password with uppercase, lowercase, and at least one number.

dashboard.title: Your personal shopping lounge
dashboard.description: Everything about your product requests in one elegant space, with faster checkout context and cleaner buyer history.
dashboard.noIntents: You have not started a checkout flow yet. Pick a product to begin.

admin.title: Product Control Room
admin.description: Start with a lightweight protected admin area now, then evolve it into a richer authentication flow later without rewriting the product management layer.
admin.disabledMessage: Admin edits are disabled while PRODUCTS_DATA_SOURCE=mock. Switch to database to create, edit, or delete products.

dashboard.activityFallback: A secure admin event was recorded.

mediaLibrary.title: Media library
mediaLibrary.description: Bulk-manage reusable assets for products and site sections. Search faster, filter by media type, and expand only the asset you want to edit.

siteStudio.title: Site content studio
siteStudio.description: Edit the homepage visually, preview changes live, manage locales, and reuse library assets without leaving the content workflow.

themeStudio.title: Theme studio
themeStudio.description: Manage the storefront palette, save reusable presets, and import or export theme JSON without leaving the admin workflow.

login.title: Secure admin access
login.description: Sign in to manage the multilingual catalog with persisted sessions, audit history, and a stronger operational foundation.
login.rateLimited: Too many authentication attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
login.accountDisabled: This admin account is disabled. Contact the owner to restore access.
login.loggedOut: You have been signed out successfully.
login.bootstrapHint: The first successful login with your bootstrap environment credentials will provision the initial admin account.
login.setupNotice: No admin account exists yet. Create the first owner account instead of relying on bootstrap credentials alone.

register.title: Create admin access
register.description: Provision the first owner account or expand the admin team with traceable access, stronger validation, and reusable account metadata.
register.invalidForm: Please review the form fields and try again.
register.usernameTaken: That username is already in use.
register.emailTaken: That email address is already in use.
register.registrationClosed: Registration is closed until an authenticated admin opens this page.
register.insufficientPermissions: Only the owner account can create additional admin users.
register.setupTokenRequired: A setup token is required before the first admin can be provisioned.
register.rateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
register.firstAdminHint: The first account is created as the owner and is signed in immediately after setup.
register.teamHint: Additional accounts are created as team managers so the owner can keep the main credentials stable.
register.setupTokenHint: Set ADMIN_SETUP_TOKEN in production to lock the first-run setup behind a private token.

customers.title: Customer and buyer tracking
customers.description: Review registered customers and checkout intent history so support, campaigns, and fulfillment can run from one operational view.

inventory.title: Edit existing products
inventory.managerDescription: Manage base catalog fields and locale-specific translations in one place. This is the foundation for a fully multilingual storefront and richer admin workflows.
inventory.searchPlaceholder: Search products by name, tag, or slug

translationAssistant.fillBaseFields: Fill the base product fields first.
translationAssistant.selectTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language.
translationAssistant.updated: Translations updated. Review them before saving.

productEditor.workspaceDescription: Switch between reusable library media, manual URLs, and locale translations without losing your form state.
productEditor.libraryCoverDescription: Choose the main product image from the shared library, or leave it empty and fill the manual media tab instead.
productEditor.noLibraryCoverDescription: Use the manual media tab to set a direct image URL.
productEditor.libraryGalleryDescription: Select supporting images for the product gallery. Checked items will be appended after the cover.
productEditor.libraryVideoDescription: Pick a video from the shared library, or leave it empty to use a direct URL in the manual media tab.
productEditor.noLibraryVideoDescription: Keep this empty if the product uses an external or custom video URL.
productEditor.manualMediaDescription: Use direct URLs for product-specific visuals that are not ready for the shared library yet.
productEditor.translationsDescription: Auto-translate when it helps, then review each locale in a focused editor instead of scanning one long list.
productEditor.currentEditorLocaleDescription: The base fields at the top of the form already control this locale. Use this panel only if you want to keep an explicit localized override in storage.

siteTranslationAssistant.title: Push live preview changes into other languages
siteTranslationAssistant.description: Edit the current locale in the preview, translate it into the target languages, then save the page once. Generated translations stay staged until the final save.
siteTranslationAssistant.fillCurrentFields: Fill the current live preview fields before translating.
siteTranslationAssistant.selectTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language.
siteTranslationAssistant.ready: Translated site content is ready and will be saved with this form.
siteTranslationAssistant.unavailable: Site translation is unavailable right now.

siteLocalesManager.title: Locale registry
siteLocalesManager.description: Manage the storefront languages from one place. Pick from the preset list when possible, then save the page once to publish the staged locale changes.
siteLocalesManager.baseLocaleLocked: English stays locked as the base locale
siteLocalesManager.localeHelp: Open this locale in the site studio or keep editing its name and text direction here.
siteLocalesManager.label: Label
siteLocalesManager.addLanguageTitle: Search first, customize only if needed
siteLocalesManager.addLanguageDescription: Choose from the preset catalog when you do not know the locale code. Switch to custom mode only for less common locales.
siteLocalesManager.searchPlaceholder: Search by language, native name, or code
siteLocalesManager.noPresetResults: No preset languages match this search. Switch to custom mode if you need a locale that is not listed here.
siteLocalesManager.draftPlaceholder: Pick a preset or enter a custom locale to prepare the next storefront language.
siteLocalesManager.draftSavedHint: Language changes stay in draft until you save this page. That makes it safer to stage multiple locale updates together.
siteLocalesManager.invalidLocale: Pick a language from the list or enter a valid code like es, fr, or pt-br.
siteLocalesManager.duplicateLocale: That language is already staged for this site.

mediaManager.uploadDescription: This is now the main way to add photos for products and site sections. Drop one or more images here, or open your file picker.
mediaManager.controlsTitle: Search, filter, and edit assets with less noise
mediaManager.controlsDescription: Uploads should be the default workflow. Use the external asset form only when you need remote media or a third-party video.
mediaManager.searchPlaceholder: Search by label, alt text, or URL
mediaManager.label: Label
mediaManager.noMatchingAssets: No assets match the current search and filter combination.

errors.slugConflict: This slug is already in use. Please choose a different one.

seo.description: Handcrafted artisan soaps made with natural oils and botanicals. Made in Denizli.
